meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't deploy apps (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't deploy apps. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Fix Deployment Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment bottlenecks. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship production-ready apps faster than ever before.
content.answer_block: Deployment failures stem from environment drift and configuration bloat. The Antigravity project template standardizes your infrastructure-as-code, while Claude Code automates the CI/CD pipeline setup. By unifying your deployment logic into a reusable, containerized template, you eliminate manual environment errors and cut your time-to-market by 80% per client project.
content.intro:
You’ve spent days crafting the perfect feature, only to hit a wall of cryptic deployment errors. The client is waiting, the demo is due, and your local environment feels like a fragile house of cards. It’s the silent killer of freelance profitability: the 'it works on my machine' paradox that turns hours of billable work into unpaid debugging sessions.

Stop fighting the infrastructure. The Antigravity project template is designed for the modern AI-assisted workflow, providing a hardened, production-ready foundation that deploys on command. Combined with the surgical precision of Claude Code, you can now bypass the manual configuration hell that keeps your best work trapped in your local terminal.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a standardized project structure that ensures infrastructure parity across all your freelance projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard scaffold with support for Docker, TypeScript, and automated deployment hooks.

steps.title: Configure Environment Parity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to inject environment variables securely without leaking secrets into your version control.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an environment management schema that separates staging and production secrets using the Antigravity .env integration.

steps.title: Automate CI/CD Pipeline Injection
steps.description: Deploy a pre-configured GitHub Actions workflow that detects pushes and triggers container builds automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a CI/CD pipeline configuration that utilizes Antigravity best practices for automated testing and container image deployment.

steps.title: Containerize the Runtime
steps.description: Ensure your app runs identically on any cloud provider by wrapping it in a hardened Docker container defined by the template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Optimize the Dockerfile for the current project stack, ensuring minimal image size and maximum security using Antigravity hardening patterns.

steps.title: Final Deployment Validation
steps.description: Execute a dry-run deployment to verify that infrastructure connectivity and environment variables are correctly mapped.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a pre-flight deployment check to identify potential infrastructure bottlenecks before the final production push.

pro_tips: Always use a 'manifest.json' file within your Antigravity root to maintain a machine-readable record of your infrastructure requirements.
Implement 'git-crypt' alongside your template to ensure that client credentials never touch your local git history, even in private repos.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store your preferred cloud provider settings, reducing setup time for subsequent clients.
Configure your Antigravity template to automatically generate a basic README.md that documents the deployment steps for your clients.
Leverage ephemeral environments for every pull request to allow clients to review features in a live staging environment before deployment.
content.next_steps: Once your first deployment is successful, integrate a monitoring tool like Sentry or Datadog into your Antigravity template to proactively catch production errors before your clients see them.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting deployment friction hold your freelance business back. Leverage the power of the Antigravity template and Claude Code to deliver bulletproof software every single time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
